verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God's not dead, he's still alive, God's not dead, he's still alive, God's not dead, he's still alive, I feel him in my hands, I feel him in my feet, I feel him all over me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I walked with him this morning And he's not dead, I walked with him this morning And he's not dead, I walked with him this morning And he's not dead, I feel him in my hands, I feel him in my feet, I feel him all over me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I talked with him this morning And he's not dead, I talked with him this morning And he's not dead, I talked with him this morning And he's not dead, I feel him in my hands, I feel him in my feet, I feel him all over me.
